prestazioni: Upgrade to a bespoke **Zenvo LS9-TS** (6.8L supercharged V8) hybrid turbo system using **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II** turbos with billet compressor wheels, paired with a **Tial MV-R 60mm** wastegate and **TurboSmart Race Port BOV** for optimized boost response at 1.5 bar (21.7 psi), targeting 1,250+ HP on E85 fuel with a **Motec M150 ECU** custom calibration for the ST1 50S's dry-sump lubrication system

Installation of a **Zenvo-specific dry-sump oil system** with **Dailey Engineering** billet aluminum oil pan, **Moroso** 10-quart reservoir, and **Mocal** remote oil cooler to maintain 10W-60 Motul 300V oil temps below 110°C under sustained track use, paired with **ARP Custom Age 625+ head studs** and **JE Pistons** forged 2618 alloy slugs with 9.5:1 compression for E85 compatibility

Full **AP Racing CR6640-400** 6-piston monoblock calipers with **AP Racing RST12** 400mm two-piece carbon-ceramic rotors (380mm rears) and **Pagid RS29** track pads, paired with **Hawk Performance HT-14** brake fluid and **Goodridge 900 Series** braided stainless steel lines for 1,200°C heat resistance, complemented by **Öhlins TTX46 MkII** coilovers with 24-position rebound and 22-position compression damping, adjustable via **Öhlins Unic** track software
estetica: Full **Zenvo ST1 50S-specific Rocket Bunny V3** widebody kit in **3M Matte Graphite** with carbon fiber front splitter, side skirts, and rear diffuser, featuring **Vortex Generators** on the hood and **Gurney Flaps** on the rear wing for 30% increased downforce at 200 km/h (124 mph)

Custom **Forge Motorsport** titanium exhaust system with **Inconel 625** headers, **Akrapović** 100mm carbon fiber tips, and **REMUS** electronic bypass valves for a 3,500 RPM crackle tune, paired with a **Zenvo-designed** active rear diffuser with **Dymag** carbon fiber wheels (19x12 front, 20x13 rear) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** tires (295/30 ZR19 front, 345/30 ZR20 rear)

Full **VMR 701** carbon fiber interior overhaul with **Recaro Pole Position** seats (carbon shell, Alcantara/leather), **Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses**, and a **MOMO Prototipo** steering wheel with **AiM MXL2** data logger integration, complemented by a **Zenvo-exclusive** titanium roll cage (TIG-welded, **6-point** with door bars) and **Sabelt** fire suppression system
